thesisFit.title: Thesis fit
thesisFit.content: AI infra, pre-seed, solo technical founder in US. Check size $100K aligns with founder's $500K target round. Strong signal on both technical bar and stage.

team.title: Team
team.content: Supawich — solo builder, 6 years at Stripe infrastructure, shipped internal agent tooling used by 200+ engineers. Not disclosed — prior founding experience.

market.title: Market
market.content: Agent orchestration tooling. TAM estimated by founder at $4B by 2028, cited from a16z report. Comparable: LangGraph (open source), CrewAI (seed). Not disclosed — bottom-up TAM breakdown.

product.title: Product
product.content: Deterministic replay + routing layer for agent systems. Verified in repo. Contradiction: deck claims sub-100ms routing; repo benchmark reports 340ms median.

risks.title: Risks
risks.content: Solo founder concentration. Open-source commercialization path unproven. One material contradiction between deck and repo requires founder Q&A.
